prompt: A detailed Art Nouveau botanical illustration of a sloping landscape shaped like a natural valley, with a small sphere rolling step by step down toward the lowest point. Flowing organic lines, curved forms, floral motifs integrated into terrain, muted pastel colors, flat shading, decorative borders, elegant composition. Style of 19th-century naturalist illustration. No text, no labels, no numbers, no diagrams.
tradition_approach: Used flowing organic curves, flat color areas, decorative floral integration, and naturalistic composition to mirror iterative descent toward a minimum.
